overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing the protagonist Arthur Morgan walking along a dirt trail through rural grasslands. The character passes an abandoned wooden farmstead, encounters a horse-drawn carriage, and meets a group of riders on horseback in a sunlit open countryside setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through grassland with abandoned farmstead ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail toward an abandoned wooden barn visible in the distance

entered.detail: worn dirt path with grass growing on the edges, curving gently through the prairie
dilapidated wooden farm building with collapsed roof sections, weathered gray wood
low stone wall running parallel to the trail, partially overgrown with grass
mature oak and pine trees dotting the rolling grassland hills

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through sunlit grasslands. An abandoned wooden barn sits in the distance to the left, with a stone wall running alongside the path. The environment is open and peaceful, with scattered trees visible across the rolling prairie.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned farm ruins with broken fences and collapsed structures

events.description: horse-drawn carriage with two occupants approaches from ahead and passes by on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, passing the abandoned farmstead while observing the approaching carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the trail, passing the player character on the right

entered.detail: wooden wagon with two horses, carrying a driver and passenger, moving along the trail
collapsed wooden fences and broken posts surrounding the abandoned farm

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the abandoned wooden barn and its surrounding ruins, with broken fences visible on the left. A horse-drawn carriage appears ahead and passes by on the right, carrying two occupants. The stone wall continues alongside the path as the farm structures recede behind the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail approaching forested area

events.description: group of three riders on horseback approaches from ahead and passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail as a group of riders approaches and passes by

notable_agents.action: group of three riders on horseback traveling along the trail toward and past the player

entered.detail: three mounted riders on horseback, appearing as silhouettes against the horizon initially
thick line of pine trees marking the edge of a forested area

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through open grassland with a dense forest visible on the left horizon. A group of three riders on horseback approaches from the distance and passes by on the right side of the trail. The stone wall remains visible on the left as the landscape transitions toward more wooded terrain ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt trail that transitions from an abandoned farmstead into an open, wooded countryside. It begins by following a cowboy walking through sunlit grasslands, passing a stone wall and a distant wooden barn. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts past the ruins of the barn and broken fences while a horse-drawn carriage carrying two occupants passes by on the right. The trail then opens further into the prairie, where a group of three riders on horseback approaches and passes the character. Finally, the landscape transitions toward a dense forest on the horizon as the stone wall continues to guide the path into the wooded terrain.
